budget.budget_update_mechanism: Direct Roster Asset Value Transfer: Your available budget for Week W+1 equals your Week W budget plus the exact net Gold price change of the players on your roster after weekend matches (Budget_Next = Budget_Current + sum(Player_Price_Next - Player_Price_Current)). If a chosen player plays exceptionally well and their price increases by +3.5 Gold, your team budget immediately increases by +3.5 Gold.

estimated_market_model.evidence: Castle: last score 7.05, displayed change -1.2, current price 10.4. round((7.05 - 13) * 0.20, 1) = -1.2. User-confirmed historical scale anchor: Berserker was the exceptional player able to reach 32 gold in the prior split.
estimated_market_model.warning: The neutral score and rate fit one recovered price change. Historical starting prices and the complete official formula remain unknown. Estimated paths reset each split and conservatively damp positive compounding above 22 gold, with the observed 32-gold exceptional peak used as a proxy ceiling. Official API snapshots always override this estimate.
